keywords: cycle de vie complet du projet
ciclo de vida completo del proyecto
ciclo de vida completo do projeto
description: Create projects, register hours, project invoicing
preflight: POST /company/salesmodules body:{name:'PROJECT'} — activate project module if permitted
GET /employee to find project manager ID
endpoints: POST /project/hourlyRates or PUT /project/hourlyRates/updateOrAddHourRates — configure fixed price
common_errors: PROJECT module activation may return 403 in competition sandboxes; do not fail the task on that alone
projectManager must reference an existing employee
tips:
TOOL ROUTING — choose the RIGHT tool based on task type:
- Fixed price + invoice percentage (fastpris + delbetaling/fakturere X%): ALWAYS use create_fixed_price_project_invoice. Pass fixedPrice, invoicePercent, projectName, customerName/customerOrgNumber, projectManagerEmail. This tool handles project creation, fixed price setup, AND invoice generation in one call. Do NOT use create_project + create_invoice separately.
- Time registration + invoicing (timer + faktura): use register_timesheet_and_invoice.
- Simple project creation (no invoice): use create_project. ALWAYS pass hourlyRate if the prompt mentions an hourly rate/timesats — this sets up the project billing rate.
- Full project lifecycle: use create_project (with hourlyRate), then register_timesheet for hours, then create_invoice.

IMPORTANT: Always extract and pass the hourlyRate (timesats/Stundensatz/tarifa por hora) from the prompt when creating a project. This configures project/hourlyRates which is required for scoring.
